audit.label: hair

observations.full_context: The full context image shows a person with a cyan crop box around the head, indicating that the segmentation is focused on the hair area.
observations.source_crop: The source crop image contains high-resolution pixels of the person's upper body and head, which are used as reference for the mask generation.
observations.mask: The proposed binary mask covers the correct named anatomy (hair) in the full context image. It includes all visible pixels within the hair area and excludes background/clothing/neighbor anatomy.
observations.overlay: The red overlay over the source crop shows that the mask correctly identifies the hair region without including any other anatomical labels or background elements.
observations.contour: The cyan proposed boundary over the source crop matches the correct named anatomy (hair) in the full context image, indicating a proper segmentation of the hair area.
observations.neighbor_overlap: There is no magenta pixels overlap another protected anatomical label visible in this image.

audit.evidence: Deterministic topology found 11 components; ontology allows 4.
audit.correction_instruction: Remove disconnected fragments outside the main anatomy.

correction_plan.rationale: Deterministic component count exceeds the ontology maximum.
